sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Merck beats Q1 forecasts on strong Keytruda demand
feed.summary: Merck & Co. Inc. surpassed Q1 market forecasts and raised its full-year guidance, driven by robust sales of its cancer drug Keytruda. Despite strong revenue growth and a smaller-than-expected adjusted loss per share, the company reported a net loss due to a charge from a recent acquisition. Shares saw mixed trading but were slightly down by mid-morning on Wall Street.

feed.title: Information Services Group (III) Price Target Increased by 10.53% to 6.69
feed.summary: The price target for Information Services Group (III) has been increased by 10.53% to $6.69. This adjustment reflects improved analyst sentiment or new financial projections for the company. Investors may see this as a positive indicator for the stock's future performance.

feed.title: Huntington Bank looks to expand on sport footprint
feed.summary: Huntington Bank is focusing on expanding its national presence through sports partnerships. The bank currently sponsors several professional and collegiate teams, including the Browns, Blue Jackets, and Ohio State University, and is also investing in golf through endorsements and tournament sponsorship. This strategy aims to leverage over a dozen sports partnerships to maintain its recent growth trajectory.

feed.title: Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) Sets New 1-Year Low - What's Next?
feed.summary: Conagra Brands (NYSE:CAG) recently hit a new 52-week low of $13.92, trading around $14.11 with significant volume. Analysts have largely maintained "Reduce" ratings with a consensus price target of $15.80, and the company announced a quarterly dividend of $0.35, offering an annualized yield of approximately 9.8%. Insider buying has occurred, with directors increasing their stakes, while institutional investors hold a substantial portion of the company's stock.

feed.title: Smokey Bones abruptly closes all Florida, US restaurants, here's why
feed.summary: Smokey Bones Bar and Fire Grill has abruptly closed all of its locations across the United States, including its remaining three in Florida, where the chain originated. Employees were reportedly notified of the permanent closures on the same day the restaurants shuttered. The closures follow a series of ownership changes and financial restructuring, with recent Chapter 11 bankruptcy filings by FAT Brands Inc. and Twin Hospitality Group Inc., which owned Smokey Bones.

feed.title: Kevel, Dollar General and The Trade Desk Introduce First-of-its-Kind Retail Media Solution
feed.summary: Kevel, Dollar General, and The Trade Desk have launched a new retail media solution that unifies onsite and offsite advertising activation with consistent measurement. This collaboration aims to address the fragmentation in retail media by providing advertisers with a single framework to plan, execute, and measure campaigns across the full consumer journey, including both Dollar General's onsite inventory and offsite activation via The Trade Desk. The solution is expected to enable full-funnel strategies, improve performance visibility beyond last-click attribution, and allow for unified optimization, with testing beginning in June 2026.

feed.title: AI Security Risks Force CIOs to Rethink Strategy
feed.summary: The rapid rise of AI, particularly agentic and frontier models, presents both significant cybersecurity risks and opportunities for enterprises. Michael Spisak of Unit 42 at Palo Alto Networks discusses how AI intensifies existing security concerns like data leakage and supply chain vulnerabilities, while also offering advanced tools for vulnerability identification and incident response. CIOs and CISOs must proactively assess their security posture, prioritize risks, and unify security operations on a single platform to effectively combat AI-driven threats.

feed.title: KBRA Affirms Ratings for The Toronto-Dominion Bank
feed.summary: KBRA has affirmed the deposit rating of AA and short-term deposit rating of K1+ for The Toronto-Dominion Bank, with a Stable outlook for all long-term ratings. Despite significant recent settlements for anti-money laundering (AML) control deficiencies totaling US$3.1 billion, the ratings are supported by TD's diversified business model and strong financial performance. The bank's financial profile benefits from strong capital, diversified earnings, and healthy asset quality, although KBRA notes a reliance on wholesale funding and an asset cap on U.S. operations due to the AML issues.

feed.title: SLB launches AlphaSight geosteering service
feed.summary: SLB has introduced its new AlphaSight logging-while-drilling service, which utilizes multi-depth azimuthal resistivity (MDAR) technology to enhance geosteering accuracy and well placement in challenging reservoir conditions. This service provides 3D multi-depth reservoir mapping and a horizontal look-ahead capability in real-time, without compromising the rate of penetration. AlphaSight has been successfully deployed in various regions globally, improving reservoir contact and overall drilling outcomes.

feed.title: Vanguard (PHM) holds 14.43M shares, 7.53% stake reported by asset manager
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 14,428,435 shares (7.53%) of PulteGroup Inc. (PHM) via a Schedule 13G SEC filing. This filing indicates that Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power for 1,921,775 shares, with the holdings being managed across various Vanguard affiliates and funds. The report also clarifies that no other single entity holds more than 5% economic interest in the reported shares through Vanguard.

feed.title: Vanguard (NYSE: PM) reports 116.6M shares, 7.48% stake in Philip Morris
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 116.6 million shares, representing a 7.48% stake in Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE: PM) as of March 31, 2026. This disclosure, filed via a Schedule 13G, indicates that Vanguard holds sole voting power for over 15.4 million shares and sole dispositive power for all 116.6 million shares. The filing specifies that these holdings are primarily for Vanguard funds and managed accounts, with no single other person owning more than 5% interest.

feed.title: Record Q1 and higher 2026 outlook at AMETEK (NYSE: AME) after 11% sales gain
feed.summary: AMETEK (NYSE: AME) reported record first-quarter 2026 results, with sales up 11% to $1.93 billion and adjusted EPS increasing 13% to $1.97. The company raised its full-year 2026 adjusted EPS guidance to $7.94-$8.14, reflecting strong performance across both its Electronic Instruments Group and Electromechanical Group. Additionally, AMETEK announced an agreement to acquire First Aviation Services, a strategic move to expand its defense and aviation MRO capabilities.

feed.title: Gartner, Inc. (IT) Shareholders Who Lost Money Have Opportunity to Lead Securities Fraud Lawsuit
feed.summary: Glancy Prongay Wolke & Rotter LLP has announced a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) on behalf of investors who suffered losses. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner failed to disclose material information regarding its ability to meet consulting revenue targets and maintain CV growth, leading to misleading statements about the company's business prospects between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026. Investors affected during this period are encouraged to contact the firm to potentially lead the lawsuit before the May 18, 2026, deadline.

feed.title: Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT) Given Buy Rating at The Goldman Sachs Group
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group has reiterated its "buy" rating for Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT) with a consensus price target of $555.20, following stronger-than-expected Q3 earnings driven by Azure growth and AI monetization. Despite hitting $401.89 per share after a significant jump in capital expenditure and near-term free cash flow concerns, analyst sentiment remains largely bullish. Insider activity shows both sales and acquisitions, while institutional investors have largely increased their holdings in the software giant.

feed.summary: Biogen reported upbeat first-quarter earnings and sales, beating analyst consensus estimates, but cut its FY2026 adjusted EPS guidance. Following the announcement, Biogen shares saw a slight decline. Wedbush and Guggenheim analysts maintained their ratings while raising their price targets for the stock.

feed.title: TD (TD) sells MSCI EAFE‑linked notes maturing Oct 8, 2027 with 12.5% buffer
feed.summary: The Toronto-Dominion Bank is offering $5,861,000 in senior debt notes linked to the MSCI EAFE® Index, maturing on October 8, 2027. These notes provide a capped maximum payment of $1,215.84 per $1,000 (21.584% return) and include a 12.50% buffer against losses, meaning investors only incur losses if the Index falls more than 12.50% below its initial level. However, if the decline exceeds the buffer, losses are magnified by a downside multiplier, potentially leading to a loss of the entire principal, and the notes are unsecured and subject to TD's credit risk.

feed.title: BlackRock trims Lufthansa holding to 4.14% after Apr. 24 threshold
feed.summary: BlackRock, Inc. has notified Deutsche Lufthansa AG that its total voting rights in the company have decreased to 4.14% as of April 24, 2026, slightly down from a previous holding of 4.16%. This stake consists of 3.05% voting rights directly attached to shares and 1.09% through instruments, including lent securities and contracts for difference. The notification details the breakdown of these holdings and lists the chain of controlled undertakings within BlackRock.

feed.title: Corteva Appoints Christopher Policinski and Jean-Marc Gilson to Board of Directors
feed.summary: Corteva, Inc. shareholders have approved the appointment of Christopher Policinski and Jean-Marc Gilson to its board of directors, following the retirement of Lamberto Andreotti and Michael Johanns. These changes support the agricultural sciences company's plan to separate into two independent businesses. The new directors bring expertise in agriculture, food systems, global chemicals, and materials manufacturing, strengthening Corteva's leadership during this strategic repositioning.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Price Target on PNC Financial Services to $238 From $237.50
feed.summary: JPMorgan has slightly increased its price target for PNC Financial Services Group, raising it to $238 from $237.50. This adjustment was reported by MT Newswires, highlighting a minor upward revision in the bank's valuation outlook for PNC. The article also provides a comprehensive overview of recent analyst ratings and the company's profile.

feed.title: Transcript : Valero Energy Corporation, Q1 2026 Earnings Call, Apr 30, 2026
feed.summary: This article provides a transcript of Valero Energy Corporation's First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call, held on April 30, 2026. The content is primarily a record of the earnings call accessible to subscribers. It mentions that Valero Energy sees higher margins in Q2 and an overall better 2026 versus 2025.

feed.title: Hyland Named a Leader in 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Document Management
feed.summary: Hyland, a global leader in enterprise content management, has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Document Management. The company's Content Innovation Cloud, which focuses on AI-driven content intelligence, is helping organizations orchestrate people, processes, and AI. Hyland's vision aligns with the demands of the "agentic enterprise," providing integrated content and workflow solutions with industry-specific AI and robust governance.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: TriMas Q1 2026 beats EPS and revenue forecasts
feed.summary: TriMas Corporation reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, surpassing EPS and revenue forecasts with $0.24 EPS and $168.28 million in revenue. The company's stock rose 3.05% in pre-market trading, driven by organic growth, operational improvements, and strategic divestitures. TriMas also reaffirmed its full-year 2026 guidance, expecting continued sales growth and significant operating margin expansion.

feed.title: AvalonBay, Equity Residential in early merger talks
feed.summary: AvalonBay Communities and Equity Residential, two major multifamily REITs, are reportedly in early discussions about a potential merger. Such a deal would create a massive real estate entity and could face antitrust scrutiny given their significant market shares. Both companies have market capitalizations around $25 billion but have seen stock declines recently, despite reporting occupancy rates above 96 percent in their latest quarterly earnings.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Issues Pessimistic Forecast for Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) Stock Price
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has lowered its price target for Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) stock from $90 to $88, maintaining an "overweight" rating, despite Ingersoll Rand beating Q1 earnings and revenue estimates. Other analysts have varying ratings, leading to a MarketBeat consensus of "Hold" with a target price of $95.29. The report also highlights significant insider selling and high institutional ownership of the stock.

feed.title: Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) Price Target Raised to $770.00 at Wells Fargo & Company
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has raised its price target for Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) to $770.00 from $765.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a 26.88% upside. This comes despite a post-earnings share drop due to Meta's increased 2026 capital expenditure guidance for AI and plans to issue bonds. The article also details recent analyst adjustments, insider selling, and institutional ownership, along with Meta Platforms' first-quarter financial results.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Lowers Waste Management (NYSE:WM) Price Target to $268.00
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has lowered its price target for Waste Management (NYSE:WM) to $268.00 from $273.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This adjustment follows Waste Management's Q1 earnings report, where the company beat EPS estimates but missed on revenue, attributed partly to declining collection volumes. Despite the lowered price target, analyst sentiment for WM remains largely positive with a "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: Broadridge (NYSE: BR) boosts earnings as digital asset gains lift Q3 2026
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. reported a significant increase in revenue and earnings for both Q3 2026 and the first nine months of fiscal 2026, driven by strong performance in its Investor Communication Solutions and Global Technology and Operations segments. A substantial contribution to these gains came from digital asset activities, particularly related to Canton Coin, including realized and unrealized gains. The company's operating cash flow also strengthened, supporting dividends and share repurchases.

feed.title: Federal Realty earnings up next as retail REIT momentum builds By Investing.com
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust is set to report its first-quarter earnings, with analysts expecting $0.70 per share on $332.31 million in revenue. The retail REIT is benefiting from strong supply-demand fundamentals, high occupancy, and limited new supply in the market. Investors will be watching key metrics like leasing momentum, same-store net operating income growth, and the company's capital deployment strategy.
